heading: Wednesday Night
text: Partly cloudy. Chance of showers near and north of Route 2. Lows in the low to mid 50s south and in the broad northwestern valleys, mid 40s to around 50 elsewhere north. Winds from the north to northwest, decreasing to 5 mph or less, except continuing at 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly cloudy south; partly to mostly cloudy north, with a chance of showers north, mainly northeast and over high terrain. Highs in the mid to upper 60s, some lower 60s northeast and in the Adirondacks, and some lower 70s in southern valleys. North to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Partly cloudy. Chance of an early shower in the northern mountains. Lows from the mid 40s to around 50. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
